articles.title: BJP finalises seat-sharing deal with two regional parties for Assam polls
articles.description: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma says the number of constituencies sought by the Asom Gana Parishad awaits the approval of his party’s Central Parliamentary Board

articles.title: Three-day workshop on language data collection, linguistic annotation begins at Kuvempu University
articles.description: R. Vijay Sundar Ram, senior research engineer at AU-KBC Centre, in his preliminary remarks on the workshop, stated that in the Artificial Intelligence-driven economy, data is the oil

articles.title: Nainar Nagenthran slams DMK government over law and order
articles.description: He claims that murders, robberies, sexual assaults, and machete attacks had become everyday occurrences in the past five years

articles.title: ‘ ₹9 crore spent a day to…’: Jagdambika Pal criticises Opposition's 'immature' behavior in Lok Sabha — As it happened
articles.description: Presiding officer Jagdambika Pal accused the Opposition of wasting taxpayers' money by holding the House “hostage” to its demands.

articles.title: CBSE again postpones Class 12 exams in West Asia till March 16 amid ongoing war
articles.description: CBSE again postpones Class 12 exams in West Asia till March 16 amid ongoing war

articles.title: TVK flags series of crimes, accuses govt. of law and order failure
articles.description: In a post on X, the party alleges that the State administration has “completely failed”

articles.title: US responsible for attack on Iranian girls’ school? Initial probe defies Trump’s claim — what we know
articles.description: A deadly strike on a girls’ school in Iran that killed 168 people may have been carried out by United States, according to preliminary assessment
